partial_progress.details: Deep foundational research completed. Identified principled approach (Approach B: Domain-Agnostic Semantic Evaluation) for publication-quality completeness. Report provides implementation sketch with ~4 hour estimate.
key_findings: TimelineQuot correctly captures domain emergence from syntax principle
Gap is purely in connecting TimelineQuot MCS structure to semantic evaluation
Recommended Approach B: Use D = WorldState = TimelineQuot (natural unification)
Box case requires modal saturation analysis but is tractable
Zero-debt path exists (no new axioms or sorries needed)
Single existing axiom (canonicalR_irreflexive) is standard in literature

completion_data.completion_summary: Research completed. Approach B (Domain-Agnostic Semantic Evaluation) recommended for implementation. Creates TimelineQuotCanonical.lean with TaskFrame/TaskModel where WorldState = D = TimelineQuot, leveraging the natural MCS structure. Estimated 4 hours, 700 lines.
